---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for BCD
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Muneer320

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem.

**Proposed solution**
What should happen instead.

**Alternatives considered**
What other approaches were considered.

**Does this align with the BCD Constitution?**
Checklist:
- [ ] Does not diagnose disease
- [ ] Does not hide uncertainty
- [ ] Does not compare users to each other
- [ ] Preserves privacy
- [ ] Respects user autonomy
- [ ] Is accessible to underserved users
- [ ] Is supported by evidence (or needs evidence first)

**Privacy impact**
Does this feature affect how user data is stored, processed, or shared? [Yes/No]

**Clinical impact**
Does this feature affect how users perceive their health? [Yes/No]

**Target release milestone**
[alpha / closed-beta / clinical-pilot / public-beta / v1 / v2]

**Additional context**
Any other relevant information.
